name: aperture
description: Aperture — compliant selective-disclosure ZK primitive for Stellar/Soroban

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace verifier-client && npm run build --workspace @aperture/sdk && npm run build --workspace @aperture/app
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace verifier-client && npm run build --workspace @aperture/sdk && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
